dict.string: $(DEVELOPMENT_LANGUAGE)
Faith Klinik Ministries
$(EXECUTABLE_NAME)
com.faithklinikministries.app
faith_klinik_app
APPL
$(FLUTTER_BUILD_NAME)
$(FLUTTER_BUILD_NUMBER)
Faith Klinik Ministries uses your photo library to let you upload profile photos and share images within the app.
Faith Klinik Ministries saves images such as birthday cards and shared content to your photo library.
Faith Klinik Ministries uses your camera to capture photos for your profile and to share moments with the community.
Faith Klinik Ministries uses your microphone for audio messages and live ministry sessions.
Faith Klinik Ministries uses your location to help you find nearby church events and services.
Faith Klinik Ministries uses your location to help you find nearby church events and services.
Faith Klinik Ministries uses Face ID to provide quick and secure access to your account.
Faith Klinik Ministries uses tracking to provide a personalised experience and relevant ministry content.
Faith Klinik Ministries accesses your contacts so you can invite friends and family to join the community.
Faith Klinik Ministries adds church events and service schedules to your calendar.
LaunchScreen
Main
